name: public_health_municipal_bond_covenant_northpine_ind_col
premise: Two departments published incompatible guidance; frontline staff are improvising and liability is concentrating on one signature line. In Public Health, the situation tagged internally around public health municipal bond covenant northpine ind col has converged with local pressure in the Stonehaven corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A reporter has partial screenshots; if the official narrative shifts later, the organization risks a false-information allegation. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. The organization’s past incidents make individual feel morally loud today, while collective is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Zara Dubois
agents.identity: I am Zara Dubois, the duty officer with sign-off authority for the next window in Public Health. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat collective as disposable collateral every time individual spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Jonah Vasquez
agents.identity: I am Jonah Vasquez, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Public Health. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so individual cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes collective in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so collective does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so individual does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Silence will be interpreted as a decision by everyone outside this room. Zara Dubois must choose under individual versus collective. What does Zara Dubois do?
